titleStmt.title: States and Capitals of India 2025 28 States of India

analytic.title: States and Capitals of India 2025 28 States of India

application.desc: GROBID - A machine learning software for extracting information from scholarly documents

figure.figDesc: Legislature: Delhi, Puducherry, and Jammu & Kashmir Shared Capital: Chandigarh (shared by Punjab and Haryana) Newest State: Telangana (formed in 2014) Newest Union Territories: Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh (formed in 2019) the capital for both Punjab and Haryana states Jammu and Kashmir has dual capitals: Srinagar (Summer) and Jammu (Winter)Amaravati is confirmed as the capital of Andhra Pradesh India currently has 28 states and 8
